runTitle: Vercel Targeted Release Validation - v8.11.3 production recovered via local deploy

expertAssessments.rationale: Production is recovered via direct Vercel deploy, but the canonical GitLab tag deploy path still has a protected variable exposure gap.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Fix GitLab protected tag and variable exposure, then retry the existing failed v8.11.3 pipeline or confirm the issue is closed on the next semver release.

usageChecks.summary: Post-recovery billing check after local production deploy; effective 4.6046 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, no unexpected billed spike.

pendingImprovements.title: Fix GitLab protected variable exposure for semver tag deploy
pendingImprovements.note: Production is healthy again, but canonical semver tag deploy still depends on aligning GitLab protected tags and CI/CD variables.

notes: Local Vercel production deploy was used as recovery because GitLab tag deploy could not expose VERCEL_TOKEN.
This recovery does not close the canonical GitLab deploy-path configuration gap.
